title: Telidos
description: A multiplayer-friendly lightweight vanilla-plus modpack, featuring custom origins!
body:
Telidos is a multiplayer focused modpack designed to provide a refreshed vanilla experience. It features many(occasionally, I will admit, opinionated) changes to the game, including
  -  A selection of fully custom origins
  -  A reworked Nether, accessed solely by repairing Ruined Portals with crying obsidian 
        - Note that currently ruined portals need to be repaired in creative mode, as crying obsidian is unobtainable(intentional) but ruined portals do not generate intact(yet). 
  - Many rebalances to the game, including nerfs to iron farms and elytra, and a buff to non-mending equipment
  - And much more!
